title: Brass and Bone Requiem
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In an alternate Victorian London where necromantic jazz raises the dead to dance for tourist coin, a bone-fiddle player discovers her music can resurrect not just bodies but the true memories the Empire has scrubbed from history.
long_description: In an alternate Victorian London where necromantic jazz raises the dead to dance for tourist coin, a bone-fiddle player discovers her music can resurrect not just bodies but the true memories the Empire has scrubbed from history.
